channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: TLS stack 2026: post-quantum is here
item.description: Handshake failures rose 1.2 % after post-quantum TLS 1.3 rollout until we added client fingerprinting and Nitro offload. Latency fell 58 % and errors dropped 97 %.

item.title: Webhook delivery: retries, idempotency, 2026 guide
item.description: Cut webhook latency from 40s to 1.2s with idempotency and retries — AWS EventBridge Pipes, DynamoDB, and Lambda 2026 patterns

item.title: Eventual consistency patterns that prevent outages
item.description: Cut API errors 28% with eventual consistency — the 10 battle-tested patterns ranked by latency, cost, and operational overhead in 2026. Includes code and config you can deploy today.

item.title: Unified signals replace three pillars in 2026
item.description: Cut observability costs 64% by replacing three separate pipelines with one unified OTLP stream in 2026 — real benchmarks, migration steps, and the mistake most teams repeat.

item.title: AI observability: real-time dashboards without the
item.description: Cut AI observability ingest cost 70% while slashing dashboard latency from 8.2s to 220ms using NATS JetStream, OTel Collector Lua transforms, and Loki boltdb-shipper in 2026.

item.title: AWS Local Zones vs LocalStack: AI microservices in
item.description: Cut AI microservice latency 60% with AWS Local Zones in Africa — cost, performance, and the LocalStack trap most teams miss.

item.title: CI/CD pipelines stall with GPU pods: 2026 benchmarks
item.description: Cut CI/CD pipeline stalls 80% with GPU quotas and scheduler fixes — 2026 benchmarks, cost trade-offs, and rollout playbooks for AI workloads.

item.title: Harden AWS IAM in 30 minutes
item.description: Cut AWS IAM spending and blast radius 70% in 30 minutes using Access Analyzer, simulate-principal-policy, and CloudFormation ManagedPolicy — no hand-crafted JSON needed.

item.title: Signals killed React’s state mess in 2026
item.description: Meet Signals in SolidJS 1.8: cut React state stutter 20× and shrink memory 400%. See the ranked list, benchmarks, and the one tool you should adopt today.

item.title: Fine-tune or prompt: pick the wrong one in 2026
item.description: A 405B model might reach 82 % accuracy on GSM8K, but if it costs $2.10 per 1M tokens and adds 470 ms of processing, it loses to a fine-tuned 3B model that…

item.title: Test AI code, not the AI
item.description: Cut false positives 80% with property tests and fake adapters — the exact tools, numbers, and scripts teams use in 2026 to test AI code without testing the AI itself.

item.title: Fix LLM top 10 risks before prod 2026
item.description: Cut LLM security incidents 99% with OWASP Top 10 LLM controls — prompt injection, output sanitization, and rate limits that actually work in 2026.

item.title: Feature flags to experimentation: 9 platforms compared
item.description: 9 flag platforms compared: latency, cost, offline resilience — pick the one that won’t break on 2G. Save $400/month and keep experiments running when the carrier drops packets.

item.title: MCP errors: why servers go quiet in 2026
item.description: Cut MCP 204 errors 90% with keep-alive headers and 60s timeouts — connection pooling, CDN traps, and the $40 DigitalOcean fix most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: Freelance rates halved by AI tools
item.description: Freelance developer rates halved in 2026—see the exact math behind the crash, plus outcome-based pricing templates and AI lift benchmarks that prove it.

item.title: Spot AI’s hidden cost spike in your stack
item.description: Protect your salary from AI automation by mastering 3 skills — cache hit ratios, connection pools, and environment rewrites — before the bill spikes 300 % and the CFO calls.

item.title: Survive AI SaaS disruption in 2026
item.description: Find a SaaS niche immune to AI disruption — local regulation, offline constraints, and incumbents’ blind spots. PowerRec went from zero to 1,200 merchants by targeting Kenya Power receipts.

item.title: Migrations? Stop running them live
item.description: Cut migration downtime 70% by versioning schemas before deploy — concrete patterns from 3 outages and 18 months of metrics.

item.title: AI scanners find vulns: what actually works
item.description: AI scanners catch 42% more vulnerabilities than static analysis alone — but only when paired with a 200-line policy file and threat context. Learn which tools work, which numbers matter, and the exact commands to ship in 2026.

item.title: AI agents vs Argo, Tekton: which pipeline heals itself?
item.description: Self-healing pipelines 2026: Argo Workflows vs Tekton — 23% latency gap, 98% agent speed difference, and the tuning mistake that cost $1,620
